description: AutonomyProfile state survives a Cloud Run revision rollover (M1→M2)

pre_rollover.seeding_result: BLOCKED - AUTONOMY_WRITE_DISABLED (HAM_SOCIAL_AUTONOMY_WRITE_TOKEN not configured on live revision ham-api-00313-s64)

post_rollover.note: Operator must deploy M2 (git_sha e9a0ef72a0a62cb839ce44cbb2468685ecb0a9a6) to Cloud Run to capture post-rollover snapshot. M2 code is on origin/main as of 2026-05-22.

verdict: PARTIAL - pre-rollover snapshot captured (M1 revision ham-api-00313-s64, Firestore-backed); seeding blocked by AUTONOMY_WRITE_DISABLED; post-rollover snapshot PENDING operator M2 deploy
operator_actions_required: Deploy M2 (e9a0ef72) to Cloud Run ham-api service
Set HAM_SOCIAL_AUTONOMY_WRITE_TOKEN on the new revision to enable write seeding
Set M2 critic env vars (HAM_SOCIAL_CRITIC_USE_HERMES, HAM_SOCIAL_CRITIC_MODEL, HAM_SOCIAL_CRITIC_TIMEOUT_SEC, HAM_SOCIAL_CRITIC_MAX_INPUT_CHARS) on the new revision
After M2 deploy: seed profile via Clerk-authed PATCH /api/social/autonomy/settings (channels.telegram.enabled=true, daily_caps.telegram=3) + POST /api/social/autonomy/launch
After M2 deploy: capture GET /api/social/autonomy post-rollover snapshot and verify byte-equality with pre-rollover + seeded state
